guest_post_pitches.pitch_angle: How B2B Teams Are Using AI to Automate Revenue Operations at Scale
guest_post_pitches.email_subject: Contributor idea for HubSpot Blog: How B2B Teams Are Using AI to Automate Revenue Operations at Scale
guest_post_pitches.email_body:
Hi HubSpot Blog team,

I wanted to pitch a contributor piece aligned to what your audience cares about most right now.

Working title: How B2B Teams Are Using AI to Automate Revenue Operations at Scale

What the piece covers:
- Why solution evaluation is the defining challenge for B2B revenue teams in 2025
- A practical framework your readers can apply immediately
- Real workflow architecture diagrams and implementation steps
- Outcome data from teams that have made the shift

Why it fits your readers:
- Written for operators, not evaluators — implementation-first, not vendor-first
- Addresses demand around managed outbound and AI-assisted GTM
- No product pitch in the body — the value is in the framework

Happy to send a full outline within 48 hours.

Best,
Rajeev Manik, Pipeleap (https://www.pipeleap.com)

authority_actions.action_detail: Use the guest post pitch template from OffPageEngine. Target DA 70+ publications. Vary anchor text per BACKLINK_ANCHOR_VARIANTS.
Use LinkedIn brief from OffPageEngine. Post Monday insight + Thursday how-to. Start The Outbound Letter newsletter — weekly, indexes on Google.

authority_actions.tactic: Podcast: 30 Minutes to Presidents Club, The Sales Evangelist, Make It Happen Mondays
authority_actions.action_detail: Pitch: 30 Minutes to Presidents Club, The Sales Evangelist, Make It Happen Mondays. Lead with: how Pipeleap reduces SDR admin from 65% to under 20% of their day. Request show notes link to pipeleap.com.
Full Product Hunt launch. Prep: hunter with 500+ followers, 50 upvotes in first hour. Generates ~50 high-DA backlinks automatically.
